Jumanji: The Next Level (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $316,831,246Details
International Box Office $475,641,422
Worldwide Box Office $792,472,668
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $25,413,684
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $26,320,651
Total $51,734,335
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The gang is back but the game has changed. As they return to Jumanji to rescue one of their own, they discover that nothing is as they expect. The players will have to brave parts unknown and unexplored, from the arid deserts to the snowy mountains, in order to escape the world’s most dangerous game.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$59,251,543 (18.7% of total gross)
Legs:5.35 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:40.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$125,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,227 opening theaters/4,227 max. theaters, 9.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $413,324,396

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 13th, 2019 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
December 13th, 2019 (IMAX) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: December 4th, 2019 (Wide) (Taiwan)
December 4th, 2019 (Wide) (Philippines)
December 4th, 2019 (Wide) (Indonesia)
December 4th, 2019 (Wide) (France)
December 4th, 2019 (Wide) (Finland)
Video Release: March 3rd, 2020 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
April 13th, 2020 by Sony Pictures
MPA Rating: PG-13 for adventure action, suggestive content and some language.
(Rating bulletin 2603 (Cert #51939), 11/6/2019)
Running Time: 123 minutes
Franchise: Jumanji
Cast, crew, or production detail: Same Role, Multiple Actors, Sequel With Returning Stars Playing New Characters
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Explorer, Video Game
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: 7 Bucks Productions, Matt Tolmach Productions, Columbia Pictures, Hartbeat Productions, Detective Agency
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

The gang is back but the game has changed. As they return to Jumanji to rescue one of their own, they discover that nothing is as they expect. The players will have to brave parts unknown and unexplored, from the arid deserts to the snowy mountains, in order to escape the world’s most dangerous game.
